testimonials.title: What our parents say on Google

items.name: Aidelyn Brage
items.text: I'm so happy with the care my child receives at ABC Kidz Preschool Daycare! The staff is kind, patient, and always professional. The place is clean, safe, and very well organized. Highly recommended!

items.name: Jessica Summers
items.text: ABC Kidz is a more than great daycare/school for kids to attend they are very friendly professional and caring for our little ones my son that went into kindergarten wants to come back here everyday with his sisters

items.name: Mariana Garcia
items.text: One of the best experiences for our child and us as parents! The attention, affection, and quality of care are exceptional ✨ We will miss them so much, so grateful for the work they did with my little one ✨

items.name: Maria Parra
items.text: Excellent service, the teachers are lovely. I go to work knowing my baby is well cared for and learning 🥰

programsSection.title: Our Programs
programsSection.subtitle: Each program is carefully planned to turn everyday experiences into meaningful learning opportunities

infants.name: Infants
infants.tagline: Loving care. Babies bloom with us.
infants.description: Welcoming babies aged 0 to 12 months, our program provides a safe haven for your littlest loved ones. Grounded in individualized care, our experienced caregivers prioritize each child's unique needs, ensuring they feel cherished and supported from the start. Through sensory exploration, infants engage with their surroundings, laying the groundwork for cognitive and emotional growth.
highlights: Individualized care tailored to each child's unique needs
Sensory exploration for cognitive and emotional growth
Gentle interactions encouraging social connections and trust
Nurturing environment designed for crucial formative months

toddlers.name: Toddlers
toddlers.description: Guided by the belief that learning is an exciting journey, we foster exploration through hands-on activities that captivate their imagination. As they immerse themselves in a world of colors, shapes, and play, these experiences become the building blocks for cognitive development. By interacting with fellow toddlers, they learn to share, communicate, and develop essential social skills in a friendly environment.
highlights: Hands-on activities that captivate their imagination
Exploring colors, shapes, and play for cognitive development
Learn to share and communicate in a friendly setting
Every discovery is celebrated, sparking lifelong love for exploration

prek.name: Pre-K
prek.tagline: Confident Kindergarten Start: Enroll in Pre-K.
prek.description: Our Pre-K program, tailored for children aged 3 to 4 years, lays a strong foundation for a successful transition to kindergarten. Through structured learning, we introduce essential concepts including letters, numbers, literacy, and foundational math skills. Our curriculum fosters social growth by encouraging cooperative play and collaborative projects, honing their ability to communicate and work together effectively.
highlights: Strong foundation in letters, numbers, literacy, and math skills
Cooperative play and collaborative projects for social growth
Fine motor coordination for writing readiness and creative expression
Academic, social, and emotional development with confidence

vpk.name: VPK
vpk.tagline: VPK Excellence: Building Bright Futures Together.
vpk.description: VPK (Voluntary Prekindergarten) sets the stage for a successful transition to kindergarten, backed by state support. We are dedicated to nurturing language and cognitive growth through interactive experiences that captivate young minds. As they explore mathematical concepts, their understanding deepens, and problem-solving skills develop.
highlights: State-backed program for successful kindergarten transition
Language and cognitive growth through interactive experiences
Special emphasis on pre-reading and pre-writing skills
Cultivate love for exploration and confidence for educational path

after_school.name: After School
after_school.description: The School's Age program is for children aged 5 to 12 who, for whatever reason, are not attending school on any given day during the year. We offer dependable and enriching care that extends beyond academic periods, ensuring children have a safe and stimulating environment year-round.
highlights: Dependable and enriching care beyond academic periods
Thoughtfully curated and engaging activities
Interactive projects and group activities
Fostering social engagement, learning, creativity, and fun

hero.title: A Caring Team
hero.subtitle: With a thoughtful approach to learning and care, we support families by providing a safe and enriching environment for every child.

story.label: Our Journey
story.title: A Story Written with Love
story.subtitle: Built on passion and dedication - discover the heart behind ABC Kidz.
story.imageCaptionSub: Our loving team with happy children
story.paragraph1: ABC Kidz was born from a simple yet powerful dream: to create a nurturing space where every child could discover their unique potential while feeling completely loved and safe.
story.paragraph2: Our founder, with extensive experience in early childhood education, envisioned more than just a daycare. She dreamed of a place where children would be educated with excellence while receiving the warmth and attention of a second family.
story.paragraph3: We are committed to becoming Tampa's premier bilingual child care center, dedicated to families who share our belief that every child deserves the very best start in life.

love.title: Unconditional Love
love.description: Every child is welcomed with open arms and genuine affection, creating a warm environment where they feel valued and cherished.

safety.title: Complete Safety
safety.description: State-of-the-art facilities and trained staff ensure your child is always protected in a secure, caring environment.

education.title: Quality Education
education.description: Our excellence-driven curriculum adapts to each child's developmental stage, fostering curiosity and a love for learning.

community.title: Family Community
community.description: We build strong partnerships with families, working together to support every child's growth and success.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: ABC Kidz Preschool, Inc, is a child development center dedicated to raising a generation of children to achieve their God-given potential and destiny.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: ABC Kidz Preschool, Inc, is a child development center dedicated to raising a generation of children to achieve their God-given potential and destiny.
highlights: Nurturing each child's unique gifts and talents
Creating a foundation for lifelong learning
Building strong community partnerships with families
Developing confident, compassionate, and capable children

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Our vision is to become the most trustworthy and enriching childcare center in the community, where every child feels safe, valued, and motivated to explore the world with curiosity and joy. We aspire to be a space where families find comprehensive support, and where children develop their cognitive, emotional, and social skills through meaningful experiences and active learning.
highlights: A trusted sanctuary for children and families in our community
A space where every child feels valued and empowered
An environment that nurtures curiosity, joy, and growth
A partner in families' most important journey - raising their children

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.description: Our philosophy is based on the conviction that learning must be a joyful, meaningful experience full of discoveries. We firmly believe that working with children is a privilege that requires sensitivity, preparation, and passion. That's why we transform every moment into an opportunity for growth, integrating play, creativity, and curiosity as the main drivers of childhood development.
highlights: Learning is joyful, meaningful, and discovery-filled
Every moment is an opportunity for growth and development
Play, creativity, and curiosity drive childhood development
Working with children is a sacred privilege requiring passion and preparation

values.subtitle: These principles define who we are and how we serve every child and family

learning.description: We encourage exploration, creativity and discovery through practical experiences that stimulate the child's natural curiosity.

diversity.title: Diversity and Inclusion
diversity.description: We value and celebrate cultural, linguistic and personal differences. Every child is welcome and treated with equity.

communication.title: Open Communication with Families
communication.description: We maintain constant, transparent and collaborative dialogue with parents to ensure each child's well-being and development.

development.title: Integral Development
development.description: We support cognitive, emotional, social and physical growth, recognizing that each developmental stage is unique and important.

professionalism.title: Professionalism and Ethics
professionalism.description: Our team acts with responsibility, commitment and vocation, guaranteeing high-quality service.

play.title: Play with Purpose
play.description: We believe in the value of play as a fundamental tool for learning, expression and socialization.

team.introParagraph1: Our team isn't just staff - they're family. Every educator at ABC Kidz has been carefully chosen for their genuine passion for children and commitment to excellence in early education.
team.introParagraph2: United by our love for teaching and care, we create an environment where children feel safe to explore, learn, and grow into confident individuals.

meta.title: Terms & Policies | ABC Kidz Daycare Tampa | Parent Handbook
meta.description: Read ABC Kidz daycare terms, enrollment policies, hours, payments, and safety procedures. Download the complete parent handbook. Tampa's trusted childcare center.
meta.keywords: ABC Kidz policies, daycare enrollment Tampa, daycare hours Tampa, childcare terms conditions, parent handbook daycare, daycare safety policies

hero.title: Terms and Conditions
hero.subtitle: Important information about our services, policies and procedures

items.subtitle: The following requirements are necessary for admission into our preschool:
content: Enrollment application form completed in full
Registration fee and First week’s tuition paid in full
Parent handbook receipt signed and on file
Certificate of Immunization (state required)
Physical (state required within)

items.subtitle: Operating Hours
items.content: We are open Monday through Friday from 7:00 AM to 6:00 PM. We remain closed on federal holidays and during year-end holidays according to annual calendar.

items.subtitle: Drop-off and Pick-up
content: Children must be dropped off and picked up personally by parents or authorized guardians
Signature required on check-in and check-out log
No entries are accepted after 9:30 AM as they disrupt activities

items.subtitle: Holidays
items.content: The center remains closed on federal holidays. An annual calendar is provided at the beginning of the school year with all closure dates.

items.subtitle: Registration and Weekly Tuition
items.content: A non-refundable initial registration fee is due upon enrollment. Tuition payments are strictly due on a weekly basis and must be settled in full every Monday.

items.subtitle: Accepted Payment Methods
content: Bank transfer or ACH (preferred)
Credit or debit card
Check or money order
Late pick-up fee: $10 plus $1 per minute
A non-negotiable late fee of $15 will be automatically applied every Tuesday at 9:30 AM to any outstanding balance

items.subtitle: Refund and Cancellation Policy
items.content: No credits or refunds are issued for absences, vacations, or statutory holidays. Formal written notice must be submitted a minimum of two (2) weeks prior to the intended cancellation of enrollment.

items.subtitle: Additional Fees
items.content: Ancillary services such as educational field trips, professional school portraits, or designated special events may incur supplementary charges, which will be disclosed in advance.

items.subtitle: Illness Policy
content: Children with fever above 100°F cannot attend
Must stay home for 24 hours after fever subsides without medication
Notify the center about contagious illnesses
Staff may request that you pick up a sick child at any time

items.subtitle: Medications
items.content: Medications will not be administered unless an authorized person is present.

items.subtitle: Discipline
items.content: We use positive discipline techniques. No physical or verbal punishment is allowed. We work with parents to address behavior issues.

items.subtitle: Safety
content: Regular fire and emergency drills
All visitors must register at the front desk
Security camera system in all areas
Staff trained in first aid and CPR

download.title: Complete Parents Handbook
download.description: For more detailed information about our policies, procedures and services, download our complete handbook.
download.fileInfo: ABC KIDZ Facility Parents Handbook - PDF
